'''Ekisp''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who worked as a servant for wealthy industrialist [[Bohhuah Mutdah]] and Mutdah's private estate on [[Oseon 5792]] during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]]. An elderly man with a long, white beard by [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]], one of Ekisp's duties was reading to Mutdah from his employer's extensive library.<ref name="oseon" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Flamewind of Oseon]]'' {{1st}}
